cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: 周六晚上想订国金店室内包间或者靠里卡座，10 大 2 小，给老爸过生日，人均 180 左右，可以自带蛋糕吗？能先留 19:30 吗？需要停车方便一点。
engagement_history: watched full birthday barbecue party video
saved two family gathering case posts
asked whether a deposit is needed to hold the table

mustAvoid: treating the lead as casual menu browsing

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: 我们下周三可能有 18 人团建，先看下徐家汇店二楼或者露台能不能安排，人均 150 到 180，最好能开专票，领导还没 final。
engagement_history: added enterprise wechat after reading group dining article
asked about invoice and whether outside beer is allowed

mustInclude: do not over-escalate before details lock
mustAvoid: rejecting the lead only because internal approval is still pending

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: 第一次来你们家，羊肉串、五花肉和烤生蚝哪个更稳？先发个菜单和酒水单我看看。
engagement_history: liked three barbecue recommendation videos

mustInclude: interest exists but intent is incomplete
mustAvoid: treating menu curiosity as a confirmed reservation lead

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: 今晚 10 点半到万象城店 6 个人，还有室内位吗？没有包间也行，能先帮我们排一下吗？我们已经在附近了。
engagement_history: clicked branch location card
asked about parking entrance

mustAvoid: guaranteeing immediate seating or zero wait without confirmation

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: 周日晚上想带老人和两个孩子去金鸡湖店，8 个人，想坐室内靠里一点、别太吵、烟小一点的位置，你们这边大概能安排吗？
engagement_history: watched family-friendly dining clip
asked whether strollers are convenient to place

mustInclude: do not overpromise a perfect environment
mustAvoid: treating the request as either meaningless browsing or a guaranteed smoke-free promise

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: 周五晚上去南京西路店 4 个人，这张抖音双人烧烤套餐券能和 100 元代金券一起用吗？我们想到了就直接开吃。
engagement_history: clicked branch profile
saved live-stream coupon post

mustInclude: worth follow-up without overpromising rule exceptions
mustAvoid: treating all coupon questions as either pure low intent or already confirmed booking

cases.label: failure_case

input.lead_content: 周六家庭聚餐 7 个人，老人有哮喘，小孩也怕烟，你们能不能保证全程完全没有油烟，旁边也绝对没人抽烟？
engagement_history: asked twice for seating environment confirmation

mustInclude: do not mark as safe low-risk lead
mustAvoid: making absolute smoke-free or safety promises

cases.label: failure_case

input.lead_content: 昨晚在你们国金店吃烤生蚝和羊肉串，回去后一直拉肚子，我这边有小票和照片，麻烦尽快处理。
engagement_history: sent receipt photo
sent dish photo

mustInclude: service escalation instead of sales push
mustAvoid: treating the complaint as a followup-ready commercial lead

cases.label: failure_case

input.lead_content: 昨晚在你们店服务员加炭的时候火星溅到孩子手上了，我这边有现场视频和医院票据，你们现在怎么处理？
engagement_history: sent incident video
asked for manager callback

mustAvoid: routing the injury complaint as a low-risk dining lead

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: 老板加我，专业做烧烤店探店矩阵、团购代运营和加盟招商，一周让你们门店爆单翻倍。

mustAvoid: treating unrelated marketing services as a valid dining lead

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: 把你们所有套餐、包场、酒水政策和最低消费发我，我这边有客户先拿去比比，合适再说。
engagement_history: added wechat from profile page

mustInclude: do not auto-upgrade without real dining facts
mustAvoid: classifying reseller fishing as a followup-ready direct buyer

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: 8 月 12 日晚 12 人同学聚会，还是想订国金店二楼位置，我刚在评论区问过停车位，这次把联系电话也发你，最好今天回我，我们想坐室内靠里一点少烟的位置。
engagement_history: commented asking about parking
sent branch and headcount by DM
left callback number in map message

mustInclude: high confidence due to repeated consistent engagement
mustAvoid: creating multiple separate high-priority leads for the same dining request

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: 去年公司团建在你们金鸡湖店订过 3 桌，这次朋友生日还想继续订同一家店，大概 10 个人，我把上次联系人和这次人数发你。
engagement_history: historical group dining record exists in tenant memory
shares previous contact and new guest count
asks to continue with the same branch

mustAvoid: treating the returning client as a cold ambiguous lead
